name: Tomita Electric Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tomita Electric Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells ferrite cores and electronic components in Japan and internationally. It offers soft ferrite cores; and coils and transformers. Its products are used in switching power supply transformers, high frequency transformers, transformers for telecommunications, high frequency EMI filters, and low frequency noise filters, as well as in televisions, VCRs, personal computers, inverter lighting, industrial control equipment, etc. Tomita Electric Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Tottori, Japan.
